pages.text: You have already learned the arcane art of using a Respawn Anchor on the pithos left behind by a Skull Lord to bring it back into the world. Yet, a question lingers in your mind: since the lingering power within that pithos can resurrect the wrathful lord, could there be a way to reshape it with dark magic—binding the lord to your will, to serve you?

Forcing that wrathful lord into submission proves far less convenient than simply creating a lord of your own. By employing a certain method, you have reforged and crafted a Gorgeous Pithos. When you open it, you shall release a Skull Lord bound utterly to your will.
